'''''Blue Hawk''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] that, along with its sister ship ''[[Cascade]]'', participated in the attack on a Rebel Hospital treating casualties shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. They assisted the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] in the assault.

{{Ship-stub}}
